title: An immunochromatographic test strip
abstract: The present invention relates to an immunochromatographic test strip (1) which can be encoded such that the test result cannot be understood by the user who performs the test. The test strip (1) subject of invention, includes at least one sample pad (2) in which the samples are loaded, at least one conjugate pad (3) having analyte-specific labeled antibodies present in the sample, at least one membrane (4) wherein the antibodies bound or unbound to the analyte moves forward and at least one absorption pad (5) providing movement of the sample and a two-dimensional barcode (6) on the membrane (4) that provides the authorities to interpret the results and avoids one who takes test image after test so that the test taker does not immediately understand the test result.
claims: Claims An immunochromatographic test strip (1) characterized in that the test strip prevents the interpretation of the test results by the user performing the test; wherein, the test strip comprises; at least one sample pad (2) in which the samples are loaded, at least one conjugate pad (3) having analytes-specifically labeled antibodies present in the sample, wherein the antibodies bound unbound the analyte advances and at least one membrane (4) and at least one absorption pad (5) providing advancement of the sample and two-dimensional barcode (6) that is located on the membrane (4) which has at least one content fixed zone (7) and several content-varying regions according to test result (8). The immunochromatographic test strip (1) according to Claim 1 characterized with content-varying region according to test result (8) which are located on the barcode (6) in such a way that they do not come in succession. The immunochromatographic test strip (1) according to Claim 1 or Claim 2 characterized with the barcode (6) which comprises at least two content- varying regions (8). The immunochromatographic test strip (1) according to any of the preceding claims characterized in that at least one part of the content- varying region according to test result (8) includes analyte- specific antibodies, also known as test antibodies, and all antibodies-specific secondary antibodies, also known as control antibodies. 5. The immunochromatographic test strip (1) according to any of the preceding claims characterized with several content-varying regions according to the test result (8) so that the analyte- specific antibodies to be analyzed are placed parallel to each other so as not to cross-react with each other. 6. The immunochromatographic test strip (1) according to any of the preceding claims characterized with several content-varying regions according to the test result (8) some of which is empty. 7. The immunochromatographic test strip (1) according to Claim 6 characterized that the barcode (6) must be configured to give information of the location of the content-varying region according to the test results (8) and test antibodies of such regions (8) control antibodies or empty. 8. The immunochromatographic test strip (1) according to Claim 7 characterized with barcode (6) that has an embedded code to give information of the location of the content-varying region according to the test results (8) and test antibodies of such regions (8) control antibodies or empty. 9. The immunochromatographic test strip (1) according to Claim 7 characterized with the barcode (6) that has special indicator to reach the information by querying an external database to give information of location of content- varying region according to the test results (8) and test antibodies of such regions (8) control antibodies or empty. 10. The immunochromatographic test strip (1) according to Claim 9 characterized with barcode (6) having a special indicator for each barcode (6). 11. The immunochromatographic test strip (1) according to any of the preceding claims characterized with the barcode (6) which comprises more than one color. 12. The immunochromatographic test strip (1) according to any of the preceding claims characterized with the absorption pad (5) which comprises a stain determined according to the diffusion coefficient analysis time. 13. The immunochromatographic test strip (1) according to the preceding from claim 1 to claim 11 characterized with the membrane (4) which comprises a stain determined according to the diffusion coefficient analysis time between barcode (6) and absorption pad (5). 14. The immunochromatographic test strip (1) according to the preceding from claim 1 to claim 11 characterized with the absorption pad (5) which comprises at least one encapsulated chemical substance which is structured to remove or destroy the barcode (6) within a certain period of time after the test is carried out. 15. The immunochromatographic test strip (1) according to the preceding from claim 1 to claim 11 characterized with a membrane (4) which comprises at part between barcode (6) and absorption pad (5) at least one encapsulated chemical substance which is structured to remove or destroy the barcode (6) within a certain period of time after the test is carried out. 16. The immunochromatographic test strip (1) according to any of the preceding claims characterized with several content-varying regions according to the test result (8) that comprises an antibody or chemical indicator providing to determine at least one who performs the test. 17. The immunochromatographic test strip (1) according to any of the preceding claims characterized with the barcode (6) that contains three different colors placed on it.
